name: 2D Renderer — Step 4: Coordinate system
description: Visualises the design-units -> physical-px -> clip-space coordinate layers (docs/ui-coordinate-and-responsive-layout.md): a fixed 1080x720 design canvas letterboxed to fit any window with DPI awareness, a 120-du grid, safe-area inset, and a centred card that holds its proportions on resize. Compiled-target only; needs wgpu-native + SDL3.
